# survdat

## Pull and process the NEFSC survey data

## Usage

To use this package you will need:

1.  To be behind the NEFSC firewall
2.  Permissions to access the required server : a username and password.
3.  Oracle’s instant Client installed
4.  Oracle’s ROracle R package

### Who this is for?

- Anyone looking for raw tow level survey data in the format that you
  would obtain from Ecosystem Survey Branch (ESB) - still in development

- Anyone looking for Ecosystem/multispecies products derived from the
  tow level data. See
  [vignettes](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/articles/pullingData.md)
  for explanation of methods

### Who this isn’t for!

Anyone looking for survey data that is directly input into stock
assessments. You will need to either:

- Contact the appropriate stock assessment scientist
- Visit the [Northeast Region Stock Assessment Support
  Materials](https://www.fisheries.noaa.gov/resource/data/northeast-region-stock-assessment-support-materials)
- Visit [StockSMART web
  portal](https://apps-st.fisheries.noaa.gov/stocksmart?app=homepage) or
  [stocksmart](https://noaa-edab.github.io/stocksmart/) R package
  housing the data from the portal

## Installation

``` r
remotes::install_github("NOAA-EDAB/survdat")`
```

or

    pak::pak("NOAA-EDAB/survdat")

# Package index

## Estimation

Main functions for estimating swept area biomass and stratified mean

- [`calc_swept_area()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/calc_swept_area.md)
  : Calculate swept area biomass
- [`calc_stratified_mean()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/calc_stratified_mean.md)
  : Calculate stratified mean
- [`get_area()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/get_area.md)
  : Generate a table of stratum areas

## Get Data

Functions that pull data from the SVDBS database

- [`get_survdat_data()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/get_survdat_data.md)
  : Extracts Survey data from Database
- [`get_mass_inshore_survey_data()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/get_mass_inshore_survey_data.md)
  : Extracts Massachusetts inshore bottom trawl survey data
- [`get_survdat_clam_data()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/get_survdat_clam_data.md)
  : Extracts Clam data from Survey Database
- [`get_survdat_scallop_data()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/get_survdat_scallop_data.md)
  : Extracts Scallop Survey data from Database
- [`get_length_weight_data()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/get_length_weight_data.md)
  : Extract Length and weight data from SVDBS

## Helper Functions

Functions that pull supporting information from the SVDBS database

- [`get_cruise_purpose()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/get_cruise_purpose.md)
  : Extract CRUISE PURPOSE information from SVDBS
- [`get_maturity()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/get_maturity.md)
  : Extract MATURITY information from SVDBS
- [`get_species()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/get_species.md)
  : Extract SPECIES information from SVDBS
- [`get_species_stock_area()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/get_species_stock_area.md)
  : Extract Survey strata that comprise species stock definition
- [`get_strata()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/get_strata.md)
  : Extract STRATA information from SVDBS
- [`get_sex()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/get_sex.md)
  : Extract SEX information from SVDBS
- [`get_sex_fscs()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/get_sex_fscs.md)
  : Extract SEX information from SVDBS
- [`get_vessel()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/get_vessel.md)
  : Extract VESSEL information from SVDBS
- [`get_conversion_factors()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/get_conversion_factors.md)
  : Extract CONVERSION FACTORS from SVDBS
- [`get_length_weight()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/get_length_weight.md)
  : Extract species specific LENGTH-WEIGHT COEFFICIENTS from SVDBS

## Sample Data

Random sample of data from different types of data pulls

- [`sampleBio`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/sampleBio.md)
  : Sample data pull with spcies specific biological data
- [`sampleLengthWeight`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/sampleLengthWeight.md)
  : Sample data pull with species lengths and predicted weights
- [`sampleLengths`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/sampleLengths.md)
  : Sample data pull with species lengths
- [`sampleRaw`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/sampleRaw.md)
  : Sample raw data pull
- [`sampleRawWithConversion`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/sampleRawWithConversion.md)
  : Sample raw data pull with conversion factors applied

## Plotting

Basic plotting functions to visualize data

- [`plot_data_area()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/plot_data_area.md)
  : Plots survey data and shapefile
- [`plot_shapefile()`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/plot_shapefile.md)
  : Plots shapefile

## Package Info

- [`survdat`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/survdat-package.md)
  [`survdat-package`](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/reference/survdat-package.md)
  : survdat: Pull and process Survey data

- [Calculating stratified mean
  biomass/abundance](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/articles/calc_strat_mean.md):
- [Lookup
  tables](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/articles/lookupTables.md):
- [How biomass estimates are
  calculated](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/articles/methodology.md):
- [Pulling
  Data](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/articles/pullingData.md):
- [Usage](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/articles/survdat.md):

  Design](https://noaa-edab.github.io/survdat/articles/surveyDesign.md):
